channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Nevada says volleyball match will go on despite players' forfeiture
item.description: The Nevada women's volleyball team players announced they would forfeit the game against San Jose State.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Man United great Alex Ferguson to step down as club ambassador in latest change under Jim Ratcliffe
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Manchester United great Alex Ferguson will step down from his lucrative role as club ambassador at the end of the season, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Too many men: No. 2 Oregon purposely induced late penalty in win over No. 4 Ohio State
item.description: EUGENE, Ore. (AP) — No. 2 Oregon had 12 men on the field late in its 32-31 win over No. 4 Ohio State, with the resulting penalty causing precious seconds to wind off the clock. Turns out, it was on purpose.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers calls officiating in loss 'a little ridiculous'
item.description: New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers ripped the officiating in Monday night's loss to the Buffalo Bills, even a call that was to his benefit.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers throws a 52-yard Hail Mary to Allen Lazard to end the first half vs. Bills
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Aaron Rodgers did it again. The New York Jets quarterback threw a 52-yard Hail Mary touchdown pass to Allen Lazard as time expired in the first half of a 23-20 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Allen and Bills overcome Rodgers' Hail Mary and beat Jets 23-20 to take control in AFC East
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills were expecting to go into halftime against the New York Jets with a 10-point lead and all the momentum. That changed with one eye-popping pass by Aaron Rodgers that sent the Jets and their fans into a frenzy and had social media buzzing.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Haason Reddick has new agents who hope to soon end the Jets star pass rusher's contract holdout
item.description: Haason Reddick's new agents hope to quickly resolve the New York Jets pass rusher's prolonged contract holdout. Drew Rosenhaus and Ryan Matha now represent Reddick, who was acquired by New York from Philadelphia during the offseason to help boost the team's pass rush.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 after trouncing Arizona, 41-19
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team continues to prove all the preseason prognosticators wrong. The #14 Cougars battered Arizona Saturday at LaVell Edwards Stadium to improve to 6-0 for the first time since 2020 with a dominating 41-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Middle school cheerleaders burned after coach's 'punishment'
item.description: The eighth graders said they were punished for performing a cheer at a football game their coach didn't want them to do.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Washburn, NewsNation

item.title: Padres vs. Dodgers: How to watch decisive Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: With the National League Division Series between the San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers tied at 2-2, it's win or go home for the Friars as they head up north for a decisive Game 5.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Rafael Nadal, 22-time Grand Slam tennis champ, announces retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal, professional tennis legend and 22-time Grand Slam champion announced his retirement in a video message early Thursday morning.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, WGN 9

item.title: Betts and Ohtani help the Dodgers stay alive in NLDS with 8-0 win vs the Padres
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Mookie Betts homered for the second straight night, Shohei Ohtani hit an RBI single and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Dylan Cease and the San Diego Padres 8-0 on Wednesday night to force a deciding Game 5 in their tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: BYU looks to pick up where it left off after bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It's not ideal to have a bye week while on a five-game winning streak, but #14 BYU needed the rest after getting off to a 5-0 start.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC players understand significance of first NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - No matter what happens this season, there will never be another first NHL game for the Utah Hockey Club It's just game 1 of 82, but the Utah HC players know how historic tonight's game against the Chicago Blackhawks at the Delta Center will be.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Hockey Club celebrates opening game with evening-long Delta Center plaza party
item.description: Just 172 days after it was announced Utah would be joining the National Hockey League, the Utah Hockey Club is set to play its first game in its inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers pitcher robbed at California racetrack: Report
item.description: It's unclear when the incident occurred at Santa Anita Park, located 17 miles northeast of downtown Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
